violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Observed a Quat bottle above 400 at the beginning of the inspection. This was corrected during the inspection.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Observed breakfast gravy in the reach in refrigerator not date marked at time of inspection.
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
